# Welcome to the Coastal Codebook

Welcome to the Coastal Dynamics Open Codebook. The Coastal Codebook consists of a series of Jupyter notebooks, supplementing the [Coastal Dynamics Open Textbook](https://doi.org/10.5074/T.2021.001). The interactive exercises of the Coastal Codebook help students interact with and reflect on the textbook material.

This book contains the documentation of the CoastalCodebook. It gives background information on the CoastalCodebook project, practical guidance for working with the CoastalCodebook materials, and notebook previews.

**Warning**: The notebook previews are **static** previews of the notebooks, allowing users to explore the notebook content, structure, and learning materials directly in a web browser. These previews are intended as a reference and overview of the notebooks. To access the full interactive functionality and work through the exercises as intended, the CoastalCodebook environment must be installed and the notebooks must be run locally.

**@ No previews of notebook 2b and 3a yet, they will follow soon**

```{tableofcontents}
```
